message:
fix: resolve 3 open issues (#141, #146, #149)

- #141: conversation INSERT now uses INSERT OR IGNORE, gracefully
  skipping duplicates instead of aborting the entire batch. The
  franken_insert_conversation_or_get_existing wrapper detects the
  skipped row and reuses the existing conversation ID.
- #146: OpenCode connector now checks XDG config paths on macOS
  (dirs::config_dir() and ~/.config/opencode/) in addition to
  dirs::data_local_dir() and ~/.local/share/opencode/.
  (Fix in franken_agent_detection @ 93365dd)
- #149: cass export now handles OpenCode SQLite-backed session paths
  (opencode.db/session_id) by detecting the pattern and loading the
  session directly from the SQLite database, making the
  sessions->export round-trip work for OpenCode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
